scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I wanna fly so high
Yeah, I know my wings are dried
"Look up at the wings" people say
But what lies beyond is heartlessness
Those who can fly, those who fall
No one is watching, no one even cares
Yet I kept on flying
Because I want to carry and deliver these wounded words
Chasing, hoping to reach you
We flap our wings with all our heart
The night I questioned and lamented
My hometown shined even brighter
Now I set out on a journey like a migratory bird
A story that doesn't even exist
I will show you I can draw it
I wanna fly so far away with my guitar
People sing, "You're not alone"
It's not wrong, nor is it just an ideal theory
I just don't want to live by relying on others
No one is listening, no one even cares
Yet I kept on singing
Because I want to make you, who are hurt, smile
I will deliver a tailwind to you
We flap our wings with all our heart
I will carry you, who were burdened with a distant past, into the future
Now like a migratory bird, we form a flock
Until the day we finish playing this grand quartet
All this time we come and we grow
Now it's time that we should go
But we both know that this is for sure
It's not the end of the world
Well, see you one day
Chasing, hoping to reach you
We flap our wings with all our heart
The night I questioned and lamented
Is being dyed in the colors of the morning glow
Like a migratory bird, one day I will fly back
That story that doesn't even exist
Until the day we meet again

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I want to watch the same future
I want to hold that dream in my hands
Running with our different hearts, go
In a place where it's pitch black no matter where I look
This tiny hope that sprouted
Caught my eye
I'll tune my heart that's wavering with anxiety well
I've mustered up some tiny courage
I delete the words of giving up and move forward
Even when it's painful, I'm not alone anymore
So I want to chase my dream more
My excitement won't stop
I'll show you a world that goes beyond your imagination
I want to try accessing it
I won't let myself have any regrets
Running with our different hearts, go
These dazzling feelings that shine in the virtual sky
Will deliver the light you've never seen into reality
I'll capture the cheers I always hear right here
And I'll want to search for new light again
I save your smile and move forward
I'll look back on it when I'm sad
Because it gives me strength
I want to stand tall and chase my dream
A miraculous story
Let's create the endless dream together
No one can be missing
In this world where love dances
With our different hearts, let's paint it
Even when I'm sad, even when I'm lonely
There's something we can believe in together
I want to keep making this heartbeat ring, without forgetting it
In the endless world
Smiles will overflow
I want to stand on the stage I've longed for
I want to shine like myself
Sometimes I'll cry
And want to laugh with you again
I want to watch the same future
I want to hold that dream in my hands
Let's take that first miraculous step
I want to chase my dream until I'm breathless
My excitement won't stop
I'll show you a world that goes beyond your imagination
Don't you want to try accessing it?
There are no regrets here
Creating a world with our different hearts

response.thoughts:
**My Analysis of the Video and Song Identification**

Okay, so I need to break down this video and identify the songs performed by this virtual character. The user wants a detailed summary of my process, which I can certainly provide.

First, I watched the video. From 00:00 to 00:44, the character is performing. The title "ワタリドリ" (Wataridori) clearly appears on screen, easy enough. Then, after a short pause, from 00:49 to 05:01, the second song begins. This one is titled "Shiny Smily Story (2022 ver.)", and I can see the composer and lyricist credits too. That makes things relatively straightforward.

Now, for the metadata.

*   **Song 1:** "ワタリドリ" (Wataridori). I already know the artist [ALEXANDROS]. The performer is definitely the virtual character, let's call her "Chihaya" since the text "CHIHAYA BIRTHDAY FES" is present. Language is Japanese.
*   **Song 2:** "Shiny Smily Story (2022 ver.)". This is a Hololive original. Again, Chihaya is the performer and the language is Japanese.

Next, I need to get the lyrics. I'll use the search tool to find them. I'll use the searches: "ワタリドリ [ALEXANDROS] lyrics" and "Shiny Smily Story hololive lyrics".

Now, time to construct the JSON. I'll make sure to include a step-by-step log, to reflect the thought process that I've been describing. It will document how I watched the video, identified the titles, and then searched for the lyrics. The `global_summary` will be a quick overview: Chihaya performed "Wataridori" and "Shiny Smily Story (2022 ver.)" at her birthday festival.

Also, I have to make sure each scene is a separate object, the user wants granularity. So the breakdown is:

*   Scene 1: 00:00 - 00:44 (Wataridori)
*   Scene 2: 00:49 - 05:01 (Shiny Smily Story)

Alright, time to execute the searches.



**JSON Structure Preparation**

Okay, I've got everything I need right here. I've got the data for the two songs perfectly: "Wataridori" by [ALEXANDROS], performed by Chihaya, and "Shiny Smily Story (2022 ver.)" by Hololive Idol Project, also performed by Chihaya. And thankfully, the lyrics for both are readily accessible from my search results. Time stamps are clear, which is crucial. Alright, now it's time to structure this information into the JSON format. This should be a straightforward process, given the completeness of the data.
